titleStmt.title: SII 5.749: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 749. (A.R. No. 185 of 1895). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA IN THE APPAN TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī svasti śrī . koccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakra vattikaḷ Īḻamuṅ koṅkum coḻamaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭu vallāṉai veṉṟu tillaimānagariyu ḷ virābhi
ṣekamuṅ vijaiyābhiṣe kamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrīvirapāṇṭiyade vaṟkku yāṇṭu 10 4 vatu mārkaḻi mātam muḷḷināṭṭu brahma tevam śrīceravaṉmahāde vicatu- rvve
timaṅkalattu Appaṉ tuvarāpatiappaṉ śrīpaṇṭārikaḷum tiruppati śrīvaiyiṣṇa vaṟkaḷum nampimārum Ivvaṉaivomum śibhatai śrīraṅganāthabha ṭṭarāṉa yirāmāṉucadāśa ṟk
ku piṭipāṭu kuṭutta paricāvatu yiṟṟevarai śrīpaṇṭārikaḷperā lapparkkuṭai ya taṉicu taṇṭukkaḷ vāṅki kuṭuttu kuṭātu kaṭavatāṉa Accu 2 10 Ivvaccu Irupatukkum Āṭṭaivaḻi
pali(c)cai kuṭuppatāṉa Aṟunāḻik kālāl I 4 10 ḷa Innellu nāṟpatiṅ kalattil Appaṉukku tai mātapalicai puṟappaṭṭaruḷi viśeṣasamā rādhanam koṇṭaruḷi tiruppatiyil Eḻuntaruḷip pukkaruḷu
kai (k)ku Amutupaṭic cāttupaṭikku celuttuvomāṉa I 10 ḷa-m Appaṉukku paṅkūṉitirunāḷukku tiruppaṇi ceyyuñ ceṉaṅkaḷukku Amutu ceyya kuṭuppomāṉa I 3 10 ḷa-m Āka Āṇṭu Oṉṟu
kku nellu nāṟppatiṅ kalamāka vatta nellu Āṭṭaivaḻi Ippaṭi candrā[tityavat] śrīpaṇṭārattile Aṉṟāṭu śrīpaṇṭārikaḷ celutti poruvomāka
vum Inta Irāmāṉucadāsa ṟku Appaṉ tiHere and in the following four lines, a slab containing 4 letters is placed upside down.runākkaḷtoṟum cāttiyaruḷiya Aṟitippariyaṭṭaṅ kuṭuppomākavum tirunāḷilum Appaṉ puṟappaṭṭaru
ḷumiṭaṅkaḷilum miciṭukaḷuṅ kuṭuppomākavum Ippaṭikku Appaṉ tiruviḷḷamāy tirumuka(m)ṅ kuṭuttamayiley candrāditya vat celuttuvatāka ka
llilum cempilum veṭṭikoḷvatāka piṭipāṭuṅ kuṭittom Ivvaṉaivom (m) Irāmāṉuśadāsa ṟku Ivai tiruvaraṅkappaḷiyamutiṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai tirumallināṭi tātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrīcaṭakopatātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai śrīparāṅkuśadāsa ṉ Eḻuttu Ivai tiruvaṭippikkum śrīparāṅkuśa
bha ṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Ippiṭipāṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ perumelūrā maṉaṉ Appaṉāṉa
periyakoyilnampi Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.749 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
